Name: Agents registered to Baafoo Server
Expected: Both agents register to Baafoo Server

Name: Services registered to Nacos
Expected: service-provider and service-consumer both register to Nacos
Evidence: consumer /services endpoint returns both service names

Name: Agent does not break discovery
Expected: Consumer can find Provider instances via Nacos

Name: Feign call mocked
Expected: Mock enabled: returns 'hello Nacos Discovery mock'

Name: Provider direct call
Expected: Provider direct (no Agent intercept inbound) returns real
Evidence: Provider Agent does not intercept inbound HTTP

Name: Agents work independently
Expected: Provider direct returns real, Consumer Feign mocked by its Agent
Actual: Provider=hello Nacos Discovery direct; Consumer Feign=hello Nacos Discovery mock
Evidence: Provider Agent no inbound intercept, Consumer Agent outbound intercept

Name: Environment isolation rules
Expected: Mock rules only bound to Consumer env, Provider env has none
